sqlMap.select: SELECT COALESCE(r1.roleid,$roleid$) AS roleid, COALESCE(r1.menuid,m2.id) AS menuid, COALESCE(r1.validflag,0) AS validflag, r1.buttons as buttons, m2.menuName, m2.buttons as button FROM sys_role_menu_t r1 RIGHT JOIN sys_menu_t m2 ON r1.menuid=m2.id AND r1.roleid=$roleid$ WHERE m2.validflag>0 AND m2.parentid=$parentId$ order by m2.orderNo
SELECT COALESCE(id,COUNT(id)) FROM sys_role_menu_t WHERE roleid=$roleid$ AND menuid=$menuid$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role_menu_t (roleid,menuid,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo,buttons) VALUES ($roleid$,$menuid$,$validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$','$buttons$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE sys_role_menu_t SET validflag=$validflag$,buttons='$buttons$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(*) FROM sys_role_menu_t rm WHERE rm.validflag > 0 AND rm.menuid = $menuid$ AND rm.roleId IN ( SELECT roleId FROM sys_role_user_t ru WHERE ru.userid = $userid$ AND ru.validflag > 0)
SELECT * FROM sys_role_menu_t WHERE roleid=$roleid$ AND menuid=$menuid$ and validflag>0
